meta.title: A Book Talk with Robert B. Zoellick
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute Senior Fellow Thomas J. Duesterberg in conversation with Ambassador Robert B. Zoellick, former World Bank president, U.S. Trade Representative, and deputy secretary of State, on his recent book, “America in the World.” Combining deep historical research with a practitioner’s perspective on statecraft, Zoellick provides fresh insights into major episodes in the history of U.S. foreign and international economic policy. Please join Hudson Institute for what promises to be a fascinating and wide-ranging discussion.
